Remote 3D Generalist with expertise spanning the full production pipeline — from concept modeling and digital sculpting to PBR texturing, rendering, animation, and AR/VR deployment. Currently delivering collectible-inspired 3D art and product visualization for ByWassies (Dubai, UAE). Unity Certified 3D Artist · Scrum Master (SMC®) · Oxford English B2/C1.
